decisions.title: Prioritize Explore V2 GA over new feature development
decisions.context: 20+ active E2 tickets indicate GA push. Multiple sync mode bugs (ENG-9716, ENG-9720, ENG-9709) and polish items (ENG-9734, ENG-9593) blocking production readiness. North Star depends on stable decision-capture tools.

arguments.for: Aligns with 'Nail the Core' pillar. Buggy E2 prevents decision capture. Customer churn risk if GA delayed beyond Q2.
arguments.against: Delays Canvas metadata (ENG-9309) and Edge stability (ENG-9436). May impact 'Build the Moat' initiatives.

decisions.title: Staff dedicated SRE for Sift Edge production stability
decisions.context: ENG-9436 shows Edge exits on SQL lock contention. Critical for 'Embed Deeper' pillar if Edge crashes in customer environments. No retry logic evident.
decisions.blockedBy: Headcount approval for Q2 SRE hire

arguments.for: Edge stability = customer trust. Prevents escalations. Supports 'Embed Deeper' via reliable edge deployments.
arguments.against: Could reassign existing eng to own Edge reliability. SRE hire takes 8-12 weeks.

decisions.title: Accelerate CSRS (Catalog Sync/Read Service) to support Python Rules at scale
decisions.context: ENG-9457 (caching), ENG-9460 (DataFusion reads), ENG-9424 (Kafka consumer) suggest major backend refactor. Python Rules need fast catalog access. Compaction work (ENG-9805, ENG-9806) signals scale pain.

arguments.for: Unlocks Python Rules scale. Supports 'Build the Moat' via proprietary data layer. Reduces S3 throttling incidents.
arguments.against: High engineering cost. May destabilize existing DLv2 workflows. Competes with E2 GA resources.

decisions.title: Sunset Explore V1 UI components by end of Q2 2026
decisions.context: ENG-9792 swaps ExploreButton for Explore2Button. Maintaining dual UIs slows velocity. E2 defaults (ENG-9134) suggest V1 deprecation path.

arguments.for: Reduces tech debt. Focuses eng on one codebase. Aligns with 'Nail the Core'.
arguments.against: Customer migration risk if E2 has gaps. Support burden for stragglers. Docs/training costs.

decisions.title: Invest in Canvas metadata layer to enable Ask SIFT queries
decisions.context: ENG-9309 adds Canvas metadata. Ask SIFT needs structured data to answer queries. Canvas is decision-capture hub per North Star.

arguments.for: Enables Ask SIFT to surface Canvas artifacts. Drives 'Decisions Captured Per Customer'. Differentiates vs competitors.
arguments.against: Metadata schema unclear. May require LLM fine-tuning. Delays other Canvas features.

keyResults.name: Sift Edge uptime in customer envs >99.9%
Canvas adoption: 40% of users create 1+ board/week

timeAudit.weekSummary: Heavy meeting load (80% of week). E2 GA sprint reviews, Edge incident retros, CSRS architecture debates dominate calendar. Recommend: batch sync-mode bug triage into single 2hr session, delegate Canvas metadata spec review.
alerts: E2 GA sprint retro scheduled during peak focus window (Tue 10-11am)
No exec 1:1 buffer for escalations this week
